basic_details.job_title: NIT Goa Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Goa (NIT Goa) Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website nitgoa.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E/M.Tech./M.S or B.E./B.Tech. in relevant specialization of Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication Engineering/Instrumentation Engg./ Computer Engineering with minimum of 60% marks (or CGPA 6.5), GATE qualification for JRF position
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.E/M.Tech./M.S or B.E./B.Tech. in relevant specialization of Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication Engineering/Instrumentation Engg./ Computer Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks (or a minimum of CGPA of 6.5 on a 10-point scale). For SC/ST candidates, a minimum 6.0 CGPA on a 10-point scale grading system or 55% marks and a GATE qualification obtained by the candidate at some point in time. Project Associate: M.E/M.Tech./M.S OR B.E./B.Tech in relevant specialization of Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication Engg./Instrumentation Engg./ Computer Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks (or a minimum of CGPA of 6.5 on a 10-point scale). For SC/ST candidates, a minimum 6.0 CGPA on a 10-point scale grading system or 55% marks.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA as per norms Project Associate: Rs. 25,000/- pm + HRA as per norms

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Goa Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_goa: M.E/M.Tech./M.S or B.E./B.Tech. in relevant specialization of Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication Engineering/Instrumentation Engg./ Computer Engineering with minimum of 60% marks (or CGPA 6.5), GATE qualification for JRF position

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Goa Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Goa Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.E/M.Tech./M.S or B.E./B.Tech. in relevant specialization of Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication Engineering/Instrumentation Engg./ Computer Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks (or a minimum of CGPA of 6.5 on a 10-point scale). For SC/ST candidates, a minimum 6.0 CGPA on a 10-point scale grading system or 55% marks and a GATE qualification obtained by the candidate at some point in time. Project Associate: M.E/M.Tech./M.S OR B.E./B.Tech in relevant specialization of Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication Engg./Instrumentation Engg./ Computer Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks (or a minimum of CGPA of 6.5 on a 10-point scale). For SC/ST candidates, a minimum 6.0 CGPA on a 10-point scale grading system or 55% marks.

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- pm + HRA as per norms Project Associate: Rs. 25,000/- pm + HRA as per norms

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Goa Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Goa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Goa Recruitment 2026 is 26th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: For the JRF position, candidates need an M.E/M.Tech./M.S or B.E./B.Tech. in relevant engineering disciplines with at least 60% marks and a GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification states that there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate position offers a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month plus HRA as per norms.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate posts at NIT Goa will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate positions in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. Which mode of application is accepted by NIT Goa?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply for this recruitment through email. Ensure all necessary documents are attached and the subject line is clear.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of NIT Goa?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology Goa is www.nitgoa.ac.in. You can visit this site for more information.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The notification mentions specific qualification criteria for SC/ST candidates, including a lower CGPA requirement. For detailed age relaxation rules, please refer to the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this NIT Goa recruitment is NITGOA/DEAN R&C/Project Manpower/2026/01.
